languages.text: "Да будете вы благословлены Омниссией как статистически значимый фактор! Шлюзы нашей обители открыты! Пусть ответные дары повысят вероятности вашего триумфа!"
"May you be blessed by the Omnissiah as a statistically significant factor! The airlocks of our cloister are open! May reciprocal gifts increase the probabilities of your triumph!"
languages.original_text: "Да будете вы благословлены Омниссией как статистически значимый фактор! Шлюзы нашей обители открыты! Пусть ответные дары повысят вероятности вашего триумфа!"

traits.locale_text: "May you be blessed by the Omnissiah as a statistically significant factor! The airlocks of our cloister are open! May reciprocal gifts increase the probabilities of your triumph!"
"May you be blessed by the Omnissiah as a statistically significant factor! The airlocks of our cloister are open! May reciprocal gifts increase the probabilities of your triumph!"
"May you be blessed by the Omnissiah as a statistically significant factor! The airlocks of our cloister are open! May reciprocal gifts increase the probabilities of your triumph!"

languages.text: 「あなたは統計的に有意な要素として、オムニシアによって祝福されますように！私たちの修道院の気密扉は開かれています！贈り物の交換によって、あなたの勝利の可能性が高まりますように！」
languages.original_text: "May you be blessed by the Omnissiah as a statistically significant factor! The airlocks of our cloister are open! May reciprocal gifts increase the probabilities of your triumph!"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは統計的に有意な要素として、オムニシアによって祝福されますように！私たちの修道院の気密扉は開かれています！贈り物の交換によって、あなたの勝利の可能性が高まりますように！」

languages.text: «¡Que el Omnissiah le bendiga por su contribución estadísticamente significativa! ¡Las esclusas de nuestro claustro quedan abiertas! ¡Que los regalos recíprocos aumenten la probabilidad de su éxito!».
languages.original_text: "May you be blessed by the Omnissiah as a statistically significant factor! The airlocks of our cloister are open! May reciprocal gifts increase the probabilities of your triumph!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Que el Omnissiah le bendiga por su contribución estadísticamente significativa! ¡Las esclusas de nuestro claustro quedan abiertas! ¡Que los regalos recíprocos aumenten la probabilidad de su éxito!».

languages.text: "Möge Euch der Omnissiah als statistisch signifikanten Faktor segnen! Die Luftschleusen unseres Klosters sind offen! Mögen wechselseitige Geschenke die Wahrscheinlichkeit Eures Triumphs erhöhen!"
languages.original_text: "May you be blessed by the Omnissiah as a statistically significant factor! The airlocks of our cloister are open! May reciprocal gifts increase the probabilities of your triumph!"

traits.locale_text: "Möge Euch der Omnissiah als statistisch signifikanten Faktor segnen! Die Luftschleusen unseres Klosters sind offen! Mögen wechselseitige Geschenke die Wahrscheinlichkeit Eures Triumphs erhöhen!"

languages.text: « Puisse l'Omnimessie vous bénir, vous qui représentez un facteur statistiquement significatif ! Les sas de notre cloître sont à présent ouverts ! Puisse la réciprocité des dons augmenter les probabilités de votre triomphe ! »
languages.original_text: "May you be blessed by the Omnissiah as a statistically significant factor! The airlocks of our cloister are open! May reciprocal gifts increase the probabilities of your triumph!"

traits.locale_text: « Puisse l'Omnimessie vous bénir, vous qui représentez un facteur statistiquement significatif ! Les sas de notre cloître sont à présent ouverts ! Puisse la réciprocité des dons augmenter les probabilités de votre triomphe ! »

languages.text: “愿欧姆尼赛亚赐福于您，使您成为统计学意义上的显著因子！我方修道院的气闸已开启！愿互赠之礼提升您凯旋的概率！”
languages.original_text: "May you be blessed by the Omnissiah as a statistically significant factor! The airlocks of our cloister are open! May reciprocal gifts increase the probabilities of your triumph!"

traits.locale_text: “愿欧姆尼赛亚赐福于您，使您成为统计学意义上的显著因子！我方修道院的气闸已开启！愿互赠之礼提升您凯旋的概率！”

languages.text: "İstatistiksel anlamda önemli bir faktör olarak Hermesih sizi kutsasın! Manastırımızın hava kilitleri açık! Karşılıklı hediyelerimiz, zaferinizin olasılıklarını artırsın!"
languages.original_text: "May you be blessed by the Omnissiah as a statistically significant factor! The airlocks of our cloister are open! May reciprocal gifts increase the probabilities of your triumph!"

traits.locale_text: "İstatistiksel anlamda önemli bir faktör olarak Hermesih sizi kutsasın! Manastırımızın hava kilitleri açık! Karşılıklı hediyelerimiz, zaferinizin olasılıklarını artırsın!"
